nav.description: NAV totals + exec stats with anomaly guard

runtime_diagnostics.description: Veto counters, exit pipeline, liveness (updated_ts required)

engine_metadata.description: Engine version/build metadata for dashboards and preflight checks

router_health.description: Router slippage/latency/TWAP stats with global & per-symbol quality scores

symbol_scores.description: Hybrid scores with router/vol modifiers and factor diagnostics metadata

factor_diagnostics.description: Normalized factor surface with covariance/IR, orthogonalization, weights, attribution

edge_insights.description: Research-only snapshot aggregating factor, symbol, category edge metrics

episode_ledger.description: Completed trade cycles derived from execution logs — read-only observability. V2 adds authority chain binding (B.4).

fields.episodes: Array of V1 Episode objects (backward compatible — 21 fields)
fields.episodes_v2: Array|absent — V2 episodes with authority chain + deterministic UID
fields.last_rebuild_ts: ISO timestamp of last ledger rebuild
fields.stats: Aggregate stats: total_net_pnl, win_rate, exit_reasons, reconciliation, authority

episode_v2_fields.episode_id: str — sequential EP_NNNN (backward compat, not stable across rebuilds)
episode_v2_fields.episode_uid: str — EP_<sha256_12> deterministic from (symbol, side, entry_ts, exit_ts, qty, prices)

authority.entry: { request_id, decision_id, permit_id } — from nearest ENTRY LINK event
authority.exit: { request_id, decision_id, permit_id } — from nearest EXIT LINK event

authority_flags.entry_missing: bool — no ENTRY LINK found within matching window
authority_flags.exit_missing: bool — no EXIT LINK found within matching window
authority_flags.entry_ambiguous: bool — multiple equidistant ENTRY LINK candidates
authority_flags.exit_ambiguous: bool — multiple equidistant EXIT LINK candidates

episode_v2_fields.regime_bindable: bool — true if at least one regime resolved from DECISION

authority_stats.entry_coverage_pct: float — % of episodes with entry authority bound
authority_stats.exit_coverage_pct: float — % of episodes with exit authority bound
authority_stats.ambiguous_count: int — episodes with at least one ambiguous binding
authority_stats.missing_count: int — episodes with at least one missing binding
authority_stats.permit_null_on_executed_entry_count: int — SHADOW_INCONSISTENCY: permit_id null on executed entry
authority_stats.max_time_delta_s_entry: float — worst-case time gap for entry binding
authority_stats.max_time_delta_s_exit: float — worst-case time gap for exit binding

matching_algorithm.method: nearest-in-time binary search on LINK events
matching_algorithm.disambiguation: prefer exact strategy match; fail as ambiguous if tied

meta_scheduler.description: Slow-timescale meta-learning overlays for factors, conviction, and categories

alpha_router_state.description: Dynamic capital allocation based on health, regime, and meta signals

fields.smoothed: bool - whether EMA smoothing was applied

universe_optimizer.description: Dynamic symbol whitelist curator based on edge, category, meta, health signals

fields.allowed_symbols: List[str] - symbols allowed in active universe
fields.symbol_scores: Dict[str, float] - composite scores per symbol
fields.category_scores: Dict[str, float] - aggregated scores per category
fields.effective_max_size: int - max size after regime adjustments
fields.notes: List[str] - diagnostic notes for this update cycle

alpha_miner.description: Autonomous alpha miner (Prospector) scanning all exchange symbols for universe expansion candidates

fields.cycle_count: int - number of miner cycles run
fields.candidates: List[Candidate] - top scored candidates for universe expansion
fields.ema_scores: Dict[str, float] - EMA-smoothed scores per symbol

cross_pair_edges.description: Cross-pair statistical arbitrage engine (Crossfire) producing pair-level edge scores

fields.cycle_count: int - number of crossfire cycles run
fields.pair_edges: Dict[str, PairEdge] - edge scores and stats per pair key (e.g. BTCUSDT-ETHUSDT)
fields.ema_scores: Dict[str, float] - EMA-smoothed edge scores per pair

sentinel_x.description: Sentinel-X hybrid ML market regime classifier producing regime probabilities and hard labels

fields.cycle_count: int - number of Sentinel-X cycles run
fields.primary_regime: str - main regime label (TREND_UP, TREND_DOWN, MEAN_REVERT, BREAKOUT, CHOPPY, CRISIS)
fields.secondary_regime: str|null - secondary regime if probability > threshold
fields.features: Dict[str, float] - extracted market features (returns_mean, trend_slope, etc.)
fields.crisis_flag: bool - true if crisis override is active
fields.crisis_reason: str - reason for crisis override if active

regime_pressure.description: Regime Pressure Dashboard - OBSERVATIONAL ONLY metrics showing market pressure without affecting decisions
regime_pressure.warning: These metrics must NEVER be used to gate entries, size trades, alter exits, or modify regime logic

fields.current.dwell_time_hours: float - hours since last regime change
fields.pressure.confidence_velocity: float - EMA-smoothed Δ confidence per cycle
fields.pressure.near_flip_count_24h: int - times confidence was in [0.45, 0.55] band
fields.churn.regime_changes_24h: int - regime changes in last 24 hours
fields.churn.regime_changes_7d: int - regime changes in last 7 days
fields.churn.avg_dwell_time_hours_7d: float - average regime dwell time over 7 days
fields.meta.cycles_observed: int - confidence readings in history buffer

basis_snapshot.description: Per-symbol spot-futures basis snapshot from premiumIndex — carries basis_pct, mark, index prices

fields.symbols: Dict[str, BasisInfo] — per-symbol basis_pct (float), mark_price (float), index_price (float)

alpha_decay.description: Alpha Decay & Survival Curves (Thanatos) - mortality model for alpha half-life and survival probabilities

fields.cycle_count: int - number of alpha decay cycles run
fields.symbols: Dict[str, SymbolDecayStats] - per-symbol decay rate, half-life, survival/deterioration probs
fields.categories: Dict[str, CategoryDecayStats] - per-category aggregated decay stats
fields.factors: Dict[str, FactorDecayStats] - per-factor decay and weight multipliers
fields.avg_symbol_survival: float - average survival probability across symbols
fields.avg_category_survival: float - average survival probability across categories
fields.avg_factor_survival: float - average survival probability across factors
fields.weakest_symbols: List[str] - symbols with lowest survival probability
fields.strongest_symbols: List[str] - symbols with highest survival probability
fields.weakest_categories: List[str] - categories with lowest survival probability
fields.weakest_factors: List[str] - factors with lowest survival probability
fields.meta: Dict - sentinel regime, universe size, config echoes

cerberus_state.description: Cerberus Multi-Strategy Portfolio Router - dynamic head multipliers for strategy families

fields.cycle_count: int - number of Cerberus cycles run
fields.head_state: Dict[str, HeadMetrics] - per-head multipliers, EMA scores, signal components
fields.avg_decay_survival: float - average alpha decay survival probability

hydra_state.description: Hydra Multi-Strategy Execution Engine - per-head budgets, usage, and merged intents

fields.head_budgets: Dict[str, float] - effective NAV budget per head
fields.head_usage: Dict[str, float] - NAV actually used per head
fields.head_positions: Dict[str, int] - position count per head
fields.merged_intents: List[Dict] - merged symbol intents with head contributions

hydra_pnl.description: Hydra PnL Attribution - per-head equity, drawdown, kill-switches, throttle scales

fields.heads: Dict[str, HeadPnlStats] - per-head equity, drawdown, win_rate, throttle_scale

hydra_funnel.description: Hydra intent pipeline visibility funnel - tracks survival through generation, merge, doctrine, execution

fields.stages: Dict[str, int] - generated, post_merge, submitted, post_doctrine, executed
fields.regime_visibility: Dict[str, RegimeVis] - per-regime stage counts and visibility rates

edge_calibration.description: Edge Realization Ratio (ERR) accumulator - predicted vs realized edge

fields.err: float - ratio of realized returns to predicted edges

engine_lift.description: Engine lift metrics - Hydra vs legacy performance comparison

hydra_monotonicity.description: Hydra score monotonicity - Spearman correlation between score deciles and PnL

fields.head_contamination: bool - whether mixed-head scores corrupt monotonicity
fields.q5_q1_spread: float|null - Q5 minus Q1 mean return (quintile spread)

execution_quality.description: Minotaur Execution Engine - per-symbol slippage, fill quality, regime stats

fields.symbols: Dict[str, QualityStats] - per-symbol avg/p95/max slippage, fill_ratio, twap_usage

fallback_metrics.description: Fallback swap and Hydra quality telemetry - 24h rolling window

execution_alpha.description: Execution Alpha Engine - per-fill, per-symbol, per-head execution drag and alpha attribution

fields.symbols: Dict[str, AlphaStats] - per-symbol cum_alpha_usd, avg_alpha_bps, p95/p99, regime breakdown
fields.heads: Dict[str, HeadAlphaStats] - per-head alpha attribution and suggested multipliers

execution_health.description: Per-symbol execution health — router, risk, vol, sizing diagnostics

expectancy_v6.description: Per-symbol expectancy and hourly breakdown from intel pipeline

funding_snapshot.description: Per-symbol funding rate snapshot from premiumIndex — carries rate, funding_rate, next_funding_time

fields.symbols: Dict[str, FundingInfo] — per-symbol rate (float), funding_rate (float), next_funding_time (int epoch-ms)

leaderboard_state.description: Leaderboard cache for dashboard ranking tiles

offchain_assets.description: Off-chain asset holdings from treasury aggregator

offchain_yield.description: Off-chain yield metrics from treasury aggregator

pipeline_v6_compare_summary.description: V6 pipeline comparison summary — shadow vs production scoring delta

pipeline_v6_shadow_head.description: V6 shadow pipeline head state for comparison diagnostics

position_tp_sl.description: TP/SL registry — per-position take-profit and stop-loss levels

positions.description: Legacy positions snapshot — canonical source is positions_state.json

positions_state_sync.description: Sync-side positions mirror for diagnostics (not canonical)

risk_allocation_suggestions_v6.description: Intel-generated risk allocation suggestions for router autotune

router_policy_suggestions_v6.description: Intel-generated router policy suggestions for feedback allocator

synced_state.description: Aggregated sync-ready state snapshot for Firestore publish

universe.description: Active trading universe — resolved symbol list

v6_runtime_probe.description: V6 runtime probe diagnostics — feature flag echoes and pipeline health

execution_logs._doc: Append-only JSONL execution logs. Rotated files (*.1.jsonl, *.2.jsonl) are covered by the base entry.

loop_timing.description: Per-loop timing breakdowns for performance tracking

order_metrics.description: Per-order fill metrics — slippage, latency, notional

orders_attempted.description: All order attempts (pre-fill) with sizing and doctrine context

orders_executed.description: Confirmed filled orders — canonical trade record

risk_vetoes.description: Risk module veto events with reason codes

router_metrics.description: Router quality metrics — latency, slippage, fill rates

signal_metrics.description: Signal quality metrics — score distributions, veto rates

sync_heartbeats.description: Sync heartbeat events for liveness monitoring

telegram_heartbeat.description: Daily Telegram heartbeat send log — append-only, tracks every attempt

twap_events.description: TWAP slice lifecycle events (start, fill, complete, abort)

dataset_rollback.description: Dataset rollback trigger events — temporal/replay anomalies

fee_gate_events.description: Fee-edge gate verdicts — entry veto/pass decisions with edge details

belief_events_log.description: Append-only belief event log — DLE-gated probability updates from admitted sources

fields.state_snapshot_hashes: { constraints, prior_aggregate, config } — frozen state at write time

aggregate_state_log.description: Append-only canonical probability aggregates after constraint solving

fields.inputs_window: { from, to } — time range of input events

prediction_episodes_log.description: Prediction episodes — end-to-end lifecycle from belief updates to outcome resolution and scoring

dle_prediction_events_log.description: DLE authority events for prediction layer — decisions, permits, vetoes

question_graph.description: Question definitions, outcomes, and logical constraints (SUM_TO_ONE, BOUNDS, IMPLIES)

rollback_triggers_log.description: Rollback trigger events — temporal restatement, replay divergence, latency breach, silent gap, regime corruption

firewall_denials_log.description: Influence firewall denial log — every blocked consumer access attempt

prediction_state.description: Dashboard state surface — belief counts, aggregate timestamps, dataset states, constraint violations, rollback triggers, alert ranking telemetry

prediction_alert_ranking.description: P1 alert ranking telemetry — read by dashboard tile via logs/prediction/

fields.alerts_count: int — number of alerts in batch

clob_market_events.description: CLOB market data events — Layer 2 binary sleeve data plane (best_bid_ask, last_trade_price, tick_size_change, market_resolved, book, price_change)

clob_market_health.description: CLOB market client health summaries — event counts, spread stats, trade frequency

fields.spread: { mean, median, min, max, samples } or null

rtds_oracle_ticks.description: RTDS Chainlink BTC/USD oracle price ticks — Layer 1 binary sleeve data plane

fields.seq: int — upstream or local sequence number

rtds_oracle_health.description: RTDS oracle client health summaries — latency, gap, frequency stats

fields.latency_ms: { mean, median, p95, max, min } or null

binary_rounds.description: Layer 3 Round Observer — complete 15-minute BTC Up/Down round records with oracle boundaries, terminal snapshots, spread stats, bundle cost, and net EV

fields.question: str — market question text
fields.oracle_start: float|null — Chainlink BTC/USD at round start
fields.oracle_end: float|null — Chainlink BTC/USD at round end
fields.start_book: { best_bid_up, best_ask_up, best_bid_down, best_ask_down, spread_up, spread_down }
fields.bundle_cost: float|null — ask_up + ask_down from terminal snapshot
fields.event_count: int — CLOB events during round window

binary_rounds_phase1.description: Phase-1 round observer captured rounds (10-round window) — experimental subset of binary_rounds

score_decomposition.description: Per-intent hybrid score decomposition — weights × factors for MHD auditability

sizing_snapshots.description: Pre-order sizing decomposition — canonical audit of base_nav_pct × vol × adaptive × doctrine → final notional

fields.nav_usd: float — NAV at time of sizing
fields.vol_multiplier: float — tier × vol regime sizing multiplier
fields.doctrine_multiplier: float — doctrine composite multiplier (1.0 if no scaling)
fields.target_notional_usd: float — final notional sent to build_order_payload
fields.price_hint: float — price used for qty estimation
fields.conviction_mult_shadow: float|absent — shadow conviction size multiplier (present only when conviction.mode=shadow)

environment_events.description: Testnet reset events and production balance anomalies — append-only

fields.pre_reset_nav: float — last logged NAV before reset
fields.archive_path: str — path to archived state files

dle_shadow_events.description: DLE shadow chain (REQUEST → DECISION → PERMIT → LINK) — observation-only, never blocks execution (Phase A). Append-only. Schema v2 adds context_snapshot + provenance.

payload_fields_decision.decision_id: str — DEC_<hex16> deterministic from (phase_id, action_class, constraints, policy_version)
payload_fields_decision.deny_reason: str|null — doctrine veto code when verdict=DENY
payload_fields_decision.context_snapshot: dict — { regime, regime_confidence, nav_usd?, positions_hash, scores_hash? }

payload_fields_request.request_id: str — attempt_id or REQ_<hex16> derived from payload

payload_fields_permit.permit_id: str — PERM_<hex16> derived from (decision_id, request_id, ts)
payload_fields_permit.single_use: bool — always true in Phase A
payload_fields_permit.action: dict|absent — v2 only: { type (ENTRY|EXIT), symbol, direction, qty? }
payload_fields_permit.permit_ttl_s: float|absent — v2 only: TTL seconds (30 entry, 60 exit). Recorded, not enforced in Phase A
payload_fields_permit.expires_ts: str|absent — v2 only: ISO 8601 expiry computed from ts + permit_ttl_s
payload_fields_permit.scope_snapshot: dict|absent — v2 only: { regime, regime_confidence?, nav_usd?, positions_hash, scores_hash? }
payload_fields_permit.provenance: dict|absent — v2 only: { engine_version, git_sha, docs_version }

permit_behavior.deny_suppression: When verdict=DENY, no PERMIT event is emitted. LINK.permit_id is null.
permit_behavior.ttl_enforcement: Phase A: recorded only. Phase B: enforcement TBD.

payload_fields_link.ts: str — ISO 8601 timestamp (redundant with top-level ts, added B.4 for join convenience)
payload_fields_link.permit_id: str|null — cross-reference (null when verdict=DENY, no permit issued)

dle_enforcement_rehearsal.description: B.5 counterfactual enforcement rehearsal — measures what would be blocked if PERMIT was required. Shadow-only, never blocks execution. Append-only.

fields.permit_valid: bool — true if valid permit covers this order
fields.reason: str — OK | NO_PERMIT | EXPIRED | MISMATCH_SYMBOL | MISMATCH_DIRECTION | REHEARSAL_DISABLED
fields.would_block: bool — true if enforcement would have rejected this order

runtime_metrics.would_block_count: int — orders that would have been blocked
runtime_metrics.expired_permit_count: int — blocked due to expired permit
runtime_metrics.missing_permit_count: int — blocked due to no permit found
runtime_metrics.mismatch_count: int — blocked due to symbol/direction mismatch
runtime_metrics.last_evaluation_ts: str — ISO timestamp of last evaluation

phase_c_gate.description: Phase C enforcement requires all thresholds met for 14 consecutive days

dle_entry_denials.description: C.1 entry-only enforcement denial log. Append-only. Every blocked ENTRY order is recorded here. EXIT orders are never blocked and never appear in this log.

fields.deny_reason: str — ENTRY_DENIED_NO_PERMIT | ENTRY_DENIED_EXPIRED_PERMIT | ENTRY_DENIED_MISMATCH_SYMBOL | ENTRY_DENIED_MISMATCH_DIRECTION | ENTRY_DENIED_INDEX_UNAVAILABLE
fields.matched_permit_id: str|null — permit that was found but invalid (e.g. expired)

dle_permit_expired.description: Structured DLE_PERMIT_EXPIRED events — emitted every time a rehearsal evaluation finds a permit that matched but had expired. Used for latency analysis and TTL calibration. Append-only.

fields.delta_s: float — seconds between permit issuance and order evaluation
fields.ttl_s: float — permit TTL at time of issuance
fields.overshoot_s: float — how far past TTL the order was (delta_s - ttl_s)

phase_c_readiness.description: Phase C enforcement readiness — gate criteria tracking for ops + dashboard

fields.window_days_met: int — consecutive clean days achieved so far
fields.window_start_ts: str|null — ISO 8601 when current clean window started
fields.criteria_met: bool — whether all thresholds satisfied right now

current_metrics.would_block_pct: float — percentage of orders that would have been blocked
current_metrics.expired_permit_count: int — blocked due to expired permit
current_metrics.missing_permit_count: int — blocked due to no permit found

fields.rehearsal_enabled: bool — whether B.5 rehearsal is active

enforcement.entry_evaluated: int — total ENTRY orders evaluated by C.1 gate
enforcement.entry_permitted: int — ENTRY orders with valid permit (passed)
enforcement.entry_denied: int — ENTRY orders blocked (no valid permit)
enforcement.exit_passthrough: int — EXIT orders that bypassed enforcement (always pass)
enforcement.deny_reasons: dict — histogram of denial reason codes
enforcement.last_denial_ts: str — ISO 8601 of most recent denial
enforcement.last_denial_symbol: str — symbol of most recent denial
enforcement.enforce_enabled: bool — whether C.1 enforcement is active
enforcement.split_brain_count: int — divergences where enforcement denied but rehearsal would allow (expect ~0)
enforcement.last_split_brain_ts: str — ISO 8601 of most recent split-brain event
enforcement.last_split_brain_symbol: str — symbol of most recent split-brain event

fields.last_testnet_reset_ts: float — Unix timestamp of last reset
fields.last_testnet_reset_iso: str — ISO 8601 timestamp of last reset

binary_lab_state.description: Binary lab satellite sleeve state — segregated from core NAV. Read-only for dashboard.

fields.status: str — DISABLED | NOT_DEPLOYED | ACTIVE | TERMINATED | COMPLETED
fields.kill_line.breached: bool — true if kill line hit
fields.freeze_intact: bool — true if no parameter changes
fields.last_checkpoint_utc_date: str|null — last UTC date (YYYY-MM-DD) checkpoint counted

binary_lab_trades.description: Binary Lab S1 shadow sleeve trade log — append-only. Each round produces ENTRY + ROUND_CLOSED (or NO_TRADE) events. All events tagged execution_mode: SHADOW.

fields.round_id: str — R_YYYYMMDD_HHMM deterministic from round start
fields.regime: str — Sentinel-X regime at decision time
fields.pnl_usd: float|null — net PnL after fees (on ROUND_CLOSED only)
fields.deny_reason: str|null — eligibility denial reason (on NO_TRADE only)

activation_window_state.description: Full-stack activation window state (v8.0). 14-day time-bounded system certification protocol covering futures + DLE + Binary Lab + telemetry.

fields.active: bool — whether activation window is active (dual-key confirmed)
fields.halt_reason: str|null — reason for halt (drawdown_kill, manifest_drift, config_drift, etc.)
fields.risk_veto_count: int — governance risk vetoes since start_ts (excludes plumbing)
fields.plumbing_veto_count: int — exchange plumbing vetoes since start_ts (min_notional etc, observability only)
fields.dle_mismatches: int — DLE shadow mismatches since start_ts
fields.binary_lab_freeze_ok: bool — Binary Lab config freeze intact

activation_verification_verdict.description: One-time verification verdict from 7-gate GO/NO-GO evaluation. Written by scripts/activation_verify.py. Used by production scale gate to authorize sizing increases.

fields.manifest_hash: str — SHA-256 of v7_manifest.json at evaluation time
